channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Seis formas de fracasar en la gestión del cambio
item.description: En la era de la transformación digital, el cambio organizativo es constante. Depende de los líderes de TI garantizar que los usuarios absorben y aplican los cambios que sus iniciativas digitales aportan a los flujos de trabajo empresariales.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Fine-tuning Azure OpenAI models in Azure AI Foundry
item.description: Large language models (LLMs) like the OpenAI models used by Azure are general-purpose tools for building many different types of generative AI-powered applications, from chatbots to agent-powered workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Ser CIO en 2025: estos serán los principales desafíos tecnológicos
item.description: Anticipar cuáles serán las tendencias en tecnología para el próximo año tiene un poco de bola de cristal: su propio carácter disruptivo hace que en ocasiones entre en juego una herramienta que hasta entonces no había destacado.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Agencies Required to Share Custom Software Under New Law
item.description: President Joe Biden signed the SHARE IT Act, requiring agencies to share custom software code and boost efficiency and security.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: 12 must-have apps to crush your New Year’s resolutions
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you crush your New Year's goals with these 12 apps to help you stay on track and succeed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 44 awesome Android app discoveries from 2024
item.description: It’s the calm before the storm. Today, on New Year’s Day, we have a brief moment to pause and prepare — and set ourselves up for success. From a tech perspective, that means taking the time to clean up and optimize your smartphone setup.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Elon Musk throws support behind Johnson for Speaker
item.description: Elon Musk backed Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Monday, as the top Republican in the House attempts to secure support ahead of Friday’s Speaker vote. The tech mogul’s vote of confidence followed President-elect Trump’s “Complete & Total” endorsement of Johnson earlier in the day.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Rhode Islanders' data was leaked from a cyberattack on state health benefits website
item.description: Officials in Rhode Island say cybercriminals who hacked the state's system for health and benefits programs have released at least some of the files to a site on the dark web.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5
